name: David Tait
background: Mr. Tait is the Chief Executive Officer of the World Gold Council and serves as a Director of the Sponsor. He has extensive experience in the financial services industry, including roles at Credit Suisse and UBS.

company_affiliations.name: SPDR Gold Trust
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Director (Board of Directors of the Sponsor, World Gold Trust Services, LLC)
